title: Test: Add load testing
original_text: Added load testing with k6. Implemented load tests for API endpoints. Added load tests for database queries. Implemented load tests for web pages. Added load test reporting and metrics. Result: system handles 1000 concurrent users.

- Add load tests for database queries
